transcript.content: 因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：
点击状态栏 有时候没有反应； 或比较慢；
这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容

decision.archive_summary: The user required strict boundaries: do not touch Project Assistant; keep this as a standalone extension. The extension was consolidated into one status-bar based monitor with compact display, click-to-open detail popup, auto-refresh, per-window/workspace isolation, no separate context meter, and clear tooltip/workspace-path behavior including 'Ctx: no workspace' when applicable.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest question about 'ctx error' is still on the same active extension-debugging topic, so relation=continue. Recent raw context about status-bar behavior and the click/open/update fixes (t9-t11 plus t12) should stay because the error likely refers to current runtime behavior. Older implementation-history turns are resolved and can leave the next-turn raw prompt. Durable constraints and product rules from t2 and t8 should survive as semantic pins.

applied.archiveSummary: The user required strict boundaries: do not touch Project Assistant; keep this as a standalone extension. The extension was consolidated into one status-bar based monitor with compact display, click-to-open detail popup, auto-refresh, per-window/workspace isolation, no separate context meter, and clear tooltip/workspace-path behavior including 'Ctx: no workspace' when applicable.

Recent raw context about status-bar behavior and the click/open/update fixes (t9-t11 plus t12) should stay because the error likely refers to current runtime behavior. Older implementation-history turns are resolved and can leave the next-turn raw prompt. Durable constraints and product rules from t2 and t8 should survive as semantic pins.
